title: Lebanese Stew with Crispy Pork
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Lebanon, topped with crispy pork. Perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the pork cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the chopped tomatoes, lebanese spice blend, crumbly breadcrumb mixture, and stew spice blend.
Stir to combine and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the pork is cooked through.
Stir in the sour cream and let simmer for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley and a dollop of sour cream, if desired.
